content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic rewards from autonomous ICM-based agents can be repurposed to curate long-term memory storage for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agents, automatically retaining only high-outcome, uncertainty-reducing experiences that improve future active sample selection. This creates a self-sustaining memory cycle where the agent's inherent curiosity shapes which memories it keeps, rather than relying on human-designed retention rules.
